text: The ocean is hiding living light — and science just explained why. A short educational video revealing how and why animals glow in the dark. And the next part is the one people replay. A short educational video revealing how and why animals glow in the dark. The data keeps pointing to the same conclusion — once you see it, you cannot unsee it. But here is the detail almost everyone skips. That is why secrets of bioluminescence revealed changes how you should think about this. Follow for more nature secrets
